title: Soft Subgrade Undercut MM 279-280
description: Unforeseen soft silty clay subgrade encountered at MM 279.2 to 280.4 NB. Required undercut averaging 12 feet below plan grade. 18400 CY undercut excavation and disposal 22000 CY select borrow import and lime stabilization treatment.

title: Additional Guardrail - Median Widening
description: VDOT safety review required additional cable median barrier from MM 286 to MM 290 (8000 LF). Not included in original contract scope. Material and installation.

title: Utility Conflict Resolution - Dominion Power
description: Undisclosed Dominion Power fiber conduit at MM 271.4 required rerouting. Potholing excavation and coordination with Dominion. 14-day suspension of operations in conflict zone.

title: FDR Section Expansion US-11 MP 21-23
description: VDOT directed additional FDR treatment at MP 21.0-23.0 (not in original scope) following pavement coring results showing deteriorated base throughout this section. 28400 SY additional FDR plus cement and surface course.

title: Revised Approach Slab Reinforcement VA-259
description: Additional rebar per geotechnical addendum. 2200 LBS additional #6 rebar both approach slabs plus revised formwork time.
